title: Terpenoids: Part LI. A Synthesis of dl-Trans-Dihydrokhusilene
author: O. P. Vig
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 4-Formyl-6-methyl-∆ 1-  9  declene, obtained through Diel's Alder reaction of 4-methyl-l-vinyl cyclo­hexene-1 and acrolein, has been converted to trans-6-methyl-4 (1',1'-ethylenedioxymethyl) decalone-I, which on submission to Wittig's reaction with methylene triphenyl phosphorane followed by deketalisation and resubmission to Wittig's reaction with the same reagent, affords dl-trans-dihydrokhusilene.
steps_raw: 4-Formyl-6-methyl-∆ 1-  9  declene, obtained through Diel's Alder reaction of 4-methyl-l-vinyl cyclo­hexene-1 and acrolein, has been converted to trans-6-methyl-4 (1',1'-ethylenedioxymethyl) decalone-I, which on submission to Wittig's reaction with methylene triphenyl phosphorane followed by deketalisation and resubmission to Wittig's reaction with the same reagent, affords dl-trans-dihydrokhusilene.
